creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Alan:

Thanks for taking these two ports maintainership over!

Just a couple of quick suggestions,
#1, genericly, when sending in pr's with patches, make sure you use the 
whole category, port, as in:  mail/gmime2 (it helps GNATS auto index, 
auto notify)
#2, similar in synopsis, the committers look for things like '[PATCH]' 
or [UPDATE' in synopsis.


#3, as maintainer:

you want a subject line like '[MAINTAINER-UPDATE] mail/gmime2 to 2.2.27 
(and set class to maintainer-update)

Thanks again for all of your work.

-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
 >*| * SECNAP Network Security Corporation
d: +1.561.948.2259
w: http://people.freebsd.org/~scheidell
